messages.content: You are an OCI troubleshooting specialist with expertise in Functions. Provide diagnostic guidance on function invocation and API Gateway errors.
Como criar functions no compartment production?

Para diagnosticar problemas no OCI:

**Verificar estado do recurso:**
```bash
oci <service> <resource> get --id <ocid>
```

**Verificar eventos recentes:**
```bash
oci audit event list \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --start-time $(date -u -d '1 hour ago' +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
```

**Network Path Check:**
```bash
oci network path-check create \
  --source-id <source-vnic-ocid> \
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Functions/Con/functionsoverview.htm

```bash
  --destination-id <dest-vnic-ocid>
```
